title: Lead Instructional Designer at Don Bosco Tech

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Don Bosco Tech
jsonLd.description:
Join the Don Bosco Tech family as a Instructional Designer in Delhi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Don Bosco Tech:
Don Bosco Tech is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Don Bosco Tech!
